reviews.review_description: An updated version of this app is finally available. Look for Felix & Paul Studios 2024 in the store.

reviews.review_title: DOES NOT WORK on any Quest VR headset
reviews.review_description: Was a wonderful app and journey but it stopped working on my original Quest with a msg 'working on fixing it' but it's been a year like that, and now on Quest 3 I get a black screen. WHY is this still in the store???

reviews.review_title: App has not been working for a long time
reviews.review_description: I used to love going to this app now it says it's experiencing technical difficulties. This has been going on for months now and something seems amiss. All I know is right now do purchase or download this app
Bought it years ago and now no longer working on Quest 2 and 3. So sad!

reviews.review_title: Why is the this in the store?
reviews.review_description: This app has been abandoned yet remains in the store, why?
I bought this and now it doesn’t work “technical issues “… for months and months now. Refund???

Apart from their Space Explorers videos in which I purchased all of, there were some equally brilliant videos within this app.

I used to enjoy watching the NOMAD content within this app but now since the app isn’t working, the only one that is listed within Meta Tv, is the Maasai video. Would you be able to upload the remainder please, or are those videos damaged?

The work that Felix and Paul put into these videos are second to none and deserves Five Stars but I have reduced to one star, as they cannot be bothered to fix this app, well over a year since it last worked. They blame Meta for the critical error that damaged their app. Surely, like most people, you kept a back-up? Granted, the Space Explorers videos that I purchased are saved in my Meta Tv app but it would be far better if Felix and Paul fixed their app. As Picard says, “Make It So!”.

reviews.review_title: Loved it, paid for it, now broken
reviews.review_description: It's been weeks that "they are experiencing a technical problem". Considering they took money for content I cannot reach it's pretty frustrating. I had expected better from them
When I click on anything it boots me out to avatar screen. ????

developer_response.body:
Hello dan.altier, 

Could you send an email to qa@felixandpaul.com explaining the issue? Our team will take it from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Downloaded this and it worked the first time I ran it. Opened the app the next day and there was absolutely no sound on ANY of the experiences. I recommended this to other people and they had the exact same problem. I do like this program but this bug is a serious problem.
Waste of time and space. Even as a freebee it’s not worth it. Takes away your time from doing much better things.

reviews.review_title: The tour of the White House is incredibl
reviews.review_description: Felix & Paul are documentary filmmakers who, amongst other things, create 360 degree 3D documentaries for Oculus. Many of these documentaries are made available to Oculus users free of charge provided that the user downloads and installs apps such as this one to their headset. The documentaries are generally under 30 minutes each and can be streamed from within the app or can be downloaded for offline viewing (perfect for those like me with slow internet connections). As of this date of writing, perhaps 7 documentaries are currently available for streaming/download in this app (with new content planned for the future). In my favourite of the series, President Barack Obama and First Lady Michelle Obama give a tour of the White House and its various rooms, revealing both historical facts and personal anecdotes from their time in The People's House. Without question, watching this piece was enlightening and I highly recommend it.
My downloaded movies has been removed from my quest 2 and i never deleted it. Is it normal? 5 stars if the downloaded content stays on my device.

developer_response.body:
Hello venetjim02, 

This is indeed a bug and a fix will arrive in the near future that should stop this from happening. Unfortunately you will need to download the data again. We sincerely apologize for this inconvenience.
